description_long: This shotgun features a long, matte-black barrel with subtle metallic highlights and a robust, angular receiver adorned with gold accents. The stock is constructed from dark wood with ergonomic shaping and a modern, tactical buttpad, providing both traditional aesthetics and contemporary functionality. The fore-end and receiver area display a mix of metal and wood, with visible screws and mechanical details suggesting a solid, engineered build. The trigger guard is elongated and slightly squared, offering ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design is sleek and streamlined, with a focus on durability and performance. The shotgun's finish combines glossy metallic elements with matte and wooden textures, making it visually striking and practical for urban environments.
description: A sleek, long-barreled shotgun with a dark metal finish, gold accents, and a modern wooden stock. The design blends traditional wood with tactical metallic elements for a robust, urban-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the gold-accented receiver, dark wooden stock, and long black barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the stock and receiver, with minimal detail visible except the muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the gold receiver and wood stock visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttpad and stock, with the barrel receding into the distance and the gold receiver partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated and slightly squared, medium size, with a reinforced appearance
